name: keiro
description: A Haskell library that composes an event store, a pure functional core, and a subscription engine into a single production-quality framework for **event sourcing and workflow orchestration** — with an upgrade path to durable execution.

scripts.dev: pnpm run build && portless run --name keiro-docs vite site-dist
scripts.preview: pnpm run build && portless run --name keiro-docs-preview vite preview site-dist
scripts.preview:raw: pnpm run build && vite preview site-dist --host 127.0.0.1

author: Nadeem Bitar <nadeem@gmail.com>
